summary: Implemented the admin-backend + demo-timing plan. Demo timing: deposit cutoff changed 30->3 minutes (AuctionServiceImpl, DepositServiceImpl, BiddingService.DEPOSIT_DEADLINE_BEFORE_START_MINUTES); anti-sniper extension 2s->10s and removed the MAX_LIVE_DURATION hard cap so each LIVE bid pushes endTime +10s; updated BiddingServiceTimerTest accordingly; seedAuction now sets AuctionMode=LIVE and a new idempotent seedDemoLiveAuctions() refreshes the first 3 auctions each startup to start in 5/10/15 min with a 3-minute window (clears their stale bids). Admin Users backend (was missing): new AdminUserController (/api/admin/users list, /stats, PATCH /{id}/status, PATCH /{id}/role) + AdminUserDTO returning ApiResponse. Categories admin already existed (CategoryController at /api/admin/categories) and matches the frontend. Dashboard: new AdminDashboardController (/api/admin/dashboard/summary and /revenue) aggregating real Transactions/Users/Products/Auctions, plus SecurityConfig rule, frontend dashboardService.ts, and revenue page wired to show real totals. NOTE: Excel/CSV export (Apache POI) from Thang's dashboard was intentionally skipped to avoid a heavy dependency; only JSON summary/revenue implemented. Verified end-to-end via API: admin login, users list/stats, PATCH role+status, categories, dashboard summary, and anti-sniper (two bids gave endTime exactly +10s apart).
current_status: Backend http://localhost:8096 (DB SWP_Nhom3_App) and frontend http://localhost:3000 both running. Admin test account admin123@gmail.com/123456; user123@gmail.com/123456 for bidding. Demo auctions (first 3) start 5/10/15 min after each backend startup with 3-min LIVE windows; deposit closes 3 min before start; each bid adds 10s. All 7 plan todos completed; build + restart succeeded.
